# Animal Module

## Introduction

### Example of a Figure

This is a great example of how to set up a module. 

<!-- #fig-animal-icon is how the code adds figures to TOC, like a label -->
![Animal module icon](resources/animal.png){#fig-animal-icon width=35%}


### Example of a Table
| Variable | Definition |
|---|---|
| heiferI_num | Number of Heifer I animals |

: Example animal inputs {#tbl-animal-inputs}


### Examples of Equations
:::{#eqn-an-nrc-2}
$$ CBW = MW * 0.06275 \tag{\textbf{AN.NRC.2}}$$
:::



:::{#eqn-an-nrc-3}
$$ CBW = MW * 0.06275 \tag{\textbf{AN.NRC.3}}$$
:::



:::{#eqn-an-nrc-4}
$$ CBW = MW * 0.06275 \tag{\textbf{AN.NRC.4}}$$
:::



:::{#eqn-an-nrc-5}
$$ CBW = MW * 0.06275 \tag{\textbf{AN.NRC.5}}$$
:::



:::{#eqn-an-nrc-1}
$$ CBW = MW * 0.06275 \tag{\textbf{AN.NRC.1}}$$
:::

:::{#eqn-an-nrc-2}
$$ CBW = MW * 0.06275 \tag{\textbf{AN.NRC.6}}$$
:::
see @eqn-an-nrc-2
